evals.name: full-project-create
evals.expected_output: Creates review/briefing.yaml with all subprojects discovered, smoke tests drafted, critical paths traced, invariants derived, and known gaps classified. Conducts interactive interview with user on each section.

evals.name: scoped-single-subproject
evals.expected_output: Creates or updates review/briefing.yaml with only the fused-memory subproject section. Discovery agents run only for fused-memory. Interview covers fused-memory sections only.

evals.name: validate-existing
evals.expected_output: Reads existing review/briefing.yaml and checks all references (files, functions, task IDs). Reports pass/fail with specific stale or missing references. Does not modify the briefing.
